projectDescription: A from-scratch Rust reimplementation of Psych Engine — the dominant Friday Night Funkin' modding engine — with a modular workspace architecture and full Lua scripting API compatibility.
keyFeatures: 1:1 Psych Engine feature parity with identical Lua API syntax and behavior
Modular Cargo workspace with six isolated crates (core, audio, render, gameplay, scripting, app)
Psych Engine JSON chart format parsing with legacy format auto-conversion
Conductor-driven timing with mid-song BPM change support
4-lane note system with Sick/Good/Bad/Shit hit windows matching Psych Engine exactly
Dual-camera system (game world + HUD overlay) with smooth lerped movement
Sparrow XML sprite atlas loading and animation
Full Lua VM scripting with ~200+ Psych Engine function callbacks
Mod directory loading with asset override priority (mod → base)
Tween system with easing functions for Lua-driven animations
publicApiSurface: Conductor (BPM/beat/step tracking from song position in ms)
Lua callbacks: onCreate, onUpdate, onBeatHit, onStepHit, goodNoteHit, noteMiss, onEvent
Lua functions: makeLuaSprite, addLuaSprite, setProperty, getProperty, doTweenX/Y/Alpha/Angle/Zoom
